home.heroSubtitle: Invoices, inventory, production, expenses, CRM, contracts and financial analytics — unified in one modern platform for business.
home.newSubtitle: We keep expanding the platform. Here are the three biggest new features we added for your business and team.
home.featuresTitle: Everything for your business in one place
home.featuresSubtitle: From the first invoice to production, inventory traceability and financial analytics.
home.whySubtitle: Unite all core business processes in one ERP platform and automate your company's daily work. Less admin. Better control. More time to grow the business.
home.anyText: Whether you are a freelancer, a trading company, a manufacturer, a restaurant, an accounting firm or a growing business, Creative Digital Accounting adapts to your processes.
home.resultsNote: Continuous upgrades and updates with even more features to support the growth of your business.
home.ctaTitle: We also offer every digital service to grow your business
home.ctaText1: Website design and maintenance, marketing, graphic design, ad creation and management, social media support and complete marketing and digital services. We are a company with
home.ctaText2: in this field. If you'd like to use our services — get in touch.
home.jsonldDesc: Web software for invoicing, inventory traceability, production, HACCP, employees, expenses and financial analytics for businesses. Euro-ready.

steps.title: Sign up
steps.desc: Create your company profile in under 2 minutes.

steps.title: Set up
steps.desc: Customize the platform to your business needs.

steps.title: Manage
steps.desc: Invoice, track finances and run your business from one place.

newFeatures.title: Project Management
newFeatures.desc: Modern task boards by company and project — each company is a separate column. Assign tasks with priority, assignee and deadline, track status and completion, work as a team. A separate section for recurring monthly tasks and an automatic archive of completed ones.

newFeatures.title: HR portal for employees
newFeatures.desc: Full self-service for the team: personal profile, online leave requests and approvals, task assignment and tracking, salaries and social contributions — with secure, restricted access for each employee.

newFeatures.title: Growth forecasts and simulators
newFeatures.desc: Forecast of mandatory VAT registration against turnover, revenue and inventory-price simulators, and advanced analytics with KPIs and year-over-year comparison — for confident business decisions.

features.title: Invoicing
features.desc: Issue invoices, proformas, quotes, credit and debit notes, handover protocols and other business documents in seconds with automatic numbering and professional PDF templates.

features.title: Inventory & stock
features.desc: Track stock, batches, movements between warehouses and stocktakes in real time. Automate receiving, write-offs and inventory management.

features.title: Expenses & cash flow
features.desc: Track all company expenses, incoming invoices, cash operations and bank movements with a clear financial picture.

features.title: Financial analytics
features.desc: Track revenue, profit, cash flow, KPIs and a business health index through interactive reports and charts.

features.title: Clients, suppliers & CRM
features.desc: Keep complete records, document history, revenue, contracts, notes and contacts in one place.

features.title: Production & cost
features.desc: Create recipes, calculate cost, manage raw materials and automatically receive finished goods into stock.

features.title: Document archive
features.desc: Store all company documents, contracts and files securely, organized and always accessible.

features.title: Projects & contracts
features.desc: Manage projects, contracts, budgets, revenue, expenses and automatic reminders for important deadlines.

features.title: Employees
features.desc: Manage your team with information on positions, leave, sick days, salaries and accrued days in one centralized record.

features.title: HACCP documentation
features.desc: Create technological documents, recipes and HACCP documentation compliant with the requirements of the food safety authority.

features.title: Tax calendar
features.desc: Receive automatic reminders for tax and social-security deadlines so you never miss an important obligation.

features.title: Business document generation
features.desc: Over 100 ready templates for contracts, orders, powers of attorney, protocols and declarations — auto-filled with your company data (Business and Pro).

highlights.title: Everything in one platform
highlights.desc: Forget about many separate programs. Manage invoicing, inventory, production, finances, CRM, documents and analytics in one system.

highlights.title: Business health index
highlights.desc: Track financial results with charts, KPIs and business analytics.

highlights.title: Security & control
highlights.desc: User roles, access control, a log of all actions and protection of company data for maximum security.

highlights.title: Automatic reminders
highlights.desc: Track payments, tax deadlines, contracts and important events with no risk of missing them.

about.title: About us
about.intro: Creative Digital Accounting is built on the belief that small business deserves the same powerful tools as corporations — only simpler and more accessible.

cards.title: Our mission
cards.text: To free entrepreneurs from the administrative burden so they can focus on what truly matters — growing the business.

cards.title: Our approach
cards.text: Not "accounting software", but a modern business platform with an intuitive design. Every feature comes from the real needs of small and medium businesses.

cards.title: Compliance
cards.text: Dual EUR/BGN display, VAT rates 20%/9%/0%, SAF-T readiness and Bulgarian VIES validation — we cover all local requirements.

cards.title: Security
cards.text: Multi-tenant isolation — each company sees only its own data. Data is stored in a secure PostgreSQL environment with regular backups.

contact.title: Contact
contact.intro: Have a question or suggestion? Write to us and we'll reply within one business day.
contact.sentText: We'll reply within 1 business day to the email you provided.
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again or write to us directly.

faq.metaTitle: Frequently asked questions (FAQ) | Creative Digital Accounting
faq.metaDesc: Answers to the most common questions about online invoicing, migrating from other software, subscriptions and working with the Creative Digital Accounting platform.
faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about online invoicing, migration and working with the platform.
faq.notFoundText: Write to us — we'll be happy to help.

items.q: I already use other invoicing software. Can I switch to Creative Digital Accounting without issues?
a: Yes, completely. There is no accounting or legal problem with switching to a new invoicing platform at any time.
All your previously issued invoices are preserved — they remain valid and unaffected. The only important thing is document numbering: it must continue without gaps and without duplication.
In the platform you can freely set which sequence number invoicing continues from (there's an option to unlock and edit the number on each invoice), so you continue exactly where you left off.

items.q: Will I lose my data during migration?
a: No. You can enter your existing clients as well as the turnover you've already achieved with each of them (backdated). New invoices in the system are added on top of this opening turnover, so your statistics continue uninterrupted.
Registration takes under 2 minutes. Then you fill in the company details once and issue your first invoice right away.

items.q: How does invoice numbering start for a new account?
a: Numbering is automatic and starts from the beginning (0000000001). Each invoice has an option to unlock and manually edit the sequence number — if you set number X, numbering continues from there.
Invoices, proformas, quotes, credit and debit notes, plus over 100 business document templates with a professional design.
No. The platform works for companies not registered for VAT too — then invoices are issued without VAT. For registered ones the system calculates the tax automatically.

items.q: Is there a free plan and a free trial?
a: Yes. There's a free plan forever, and the Start and Business plans have a one-time 7-day free trial.
By bank transfer. After a request you receive an email with the payment details (IBAN, recipient, reference and amount). Once payment is received we activate your plan.
Yes, at any time — to a higher or lower plan. When a paid period ends without renewal the account reverts to the Free plan, and your data is preserved.
Subscription payments are non-refundable. That's why we recommend first using the free plan and the free trial to make sure the platform meets your needs.
Yes. Data is stored encrypted, passwords are hashed, and access is isolated between companies. More in the Information Security Policy.

items.q: Can I delete my company account?
a: Yes. From Company Profile → Danger Zone you can delete the account after confirmation. The action is irreversible and removes all related data.

items.q: Will there be a mobile app?
a: Yes — a mobile app for iOS and Android is coming soon, along with new platform features.
